title: WorkflowDefinition
description: Schema for an EventConductor workflow definition JSON file.

id.description: Unique identifier. Auto-generated on import if omitted.

description.description: Optional free-text description of the workflow.

limitConcurrentExecutions.description: Whether to cap the number of concurrent process instances.

maxConcurrentExecutions.description: Maximum allowed concurrent instances. Only relevant when limitConcurrentExecutions is true.

enqueueOnLimit.description: When the concurrency limit is reached, enqueue new requests instead of rejecting them.

steps.description: Ordered list of steps that make up the workflow.

id.description: Step identifier, unique within this workflow definition.

workflowDefinitionId.description: Back-reference to the parent workflow definition. Set automatically on import.

description.description: Optional description of what this step does.

preconditionStepId.description: ID of a previous step that must have completed before this one can start.

preconditionExpression.description: JEXL expression evaluated against process variables. Step is skipped if the expression returns false.

parallel.description: Whether this step can execute in parallel with other parallel-flagged steps.

topic.description: Kafka topic (or logical destination) to dispatch the task to. Required for ACTION steps.

formId.description: ID of the form to display. Required for USER_TASK steps.

childWorkflowDefinitionId.description: ID of the child workflow definition to start as a sub-process. Required for PROCESS steps.

timeout.description: Maximum execution time in milliseconds. 0 or negative means no timeout.

retries.description: Number of automatic retry attempts on ERROR or TIMEOUT before giving up.

rollbackable.description: Whether a compensation step should be triggered when this step fails after exhausting retries.

compensationStepId.description: ID of the step to execute as compensation when this step fails. Only relevant when rollbackable is true.
